creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: tota
Date: Sun Dec 30 04:28:48 2012
New Revision: 309646
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/309646

Log:
  - Update to 1.11.0
  - Switch to USE_GITHUB
  
  PR:		ports/174767
  Submitted by:	Aldis Berjoza <graudeejs_AT_gmail_DOT_com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/sysutils/zfsnap/Makefile
  head/sysutils/zfsnap/distinfo

Modified: head/sysutils/zfsnap/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/zfsnap/Makefile	Sun Dec 30 02:28:45 2012	(r309645)
+++ head/sysutils/zfsnap/Makefile	Sun Dec 30 04:28:48 2012	(r309646)
@@ -2,18 +2,18 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	zfsnap
-PORTVERSION=	1.10.1
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTVERSION=	1.11.0
 CATEGORIES=	sysutils
-MASTER_SITES=	http://files.bsdroot.lv/my/FreeBSD/distfiles/
-DISTNAME=	zfSnap-${PORTVERSION}
 
 MAINTAINER=	graudeejs@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Simple sh script to make zfs rolling snaphosts with cron
 
 NO_BUILD=	yes
-WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/graudeejs-zfSnap-${REV}
-REV=		e9e56ff
+USE_GITHUB=	yes
+GH_PROJECT=	zfSnap
+GH_ACCOUNT=	graudeejs
+GH_TAGNAME=	v${PORTVERSION}
+GH_COMMIT=	2228749
 
 PERIODICDIR?=	${PREFIX}/etc/periodic
 PLIST_SUB+=	PERIODICDIR="${PERIODICDIR:S,^${PREFIX}/,,}"
@@ -28,13 +28,13 @@ do-patch:
 
 do-install:
 	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/zfSnap.sh ${PREFIX}/sbin/zfSnap
-.for period in hourly daily weekly monthly reboot
+.for period in hourly daily weekly monthly
 	@${MKDIR} ${PERIODICDIR}/${period}
 	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/${period}_zfSnap.sh ${PERIODICDIR}/${period}/402.zfSnap
-.endfor
-.for period in hourly daily weekly monthly
 	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/${period}_zfSnap_delete.sh ${PERIODICDIR}/${period}/403.zfSnap_delete
 .endfor
+	@${MKDIR} ${PERIODICDIR}/reboot
+	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKSRC}/reboot_zfSnap.sh ${PERIODICDIR}/reboot/402.zfSnap
 
 post-install:
 	@${CAT} ${PKGMESSAGE}

Modified: head/sysutils/zfsnap/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/sysutils/zfsnap/distinfo	Sun Dec 30 02:28:45 2012	(r309645)
+++ head/sysutils/zfsnap/distinfo	Sun Dec 30 04:28:48 2012	(r309646)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (zfSnap-1.10.1.tar.gz) = 08bc589da0a76b1c525d210ca088817351642b453945d1b0ce124779fd281e4d
-SIZE (zfSnap-1.10.1.tar.gz) = 4726
+SHA256 (zfsnap-1.11.0.tar.gz) = 7e5f59eaf16413179724ace9fbbae5c53caf67f67c3516bf1b85edd4d78558a0
+SIZE (zfsnap-1.11.0.tar.gz) = 4973
